input.user_input: How does this lease agreement define 'tenant default' and what remedies does the landlord have?

actual:
I do not see a lease agreement attached to your message. Please upload or provide the text of the lease agreement you would like me to review. 

Once you provide the document, I can analyze it and tell you exactly how it defines a "tenant default" (which typically includes events like failure to pay rent, breach of lease covenants, or abandonment) and what specific remedies the landlord is granted (such as lease termination, eviction, or the right to claim damages).
